case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MEHDI M BOUDIAB

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210074254) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210074254) TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-27-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-27-2024 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OR FOR TRIAL SETTING. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210078663), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED APR-27-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-29-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT BOUDIAB, MEHDI M
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73995486) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210074254) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BOUDIAB, MEHDI M NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-08-2024
PROOF OF SERVICE OF STIPULATIOIN FOR JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73995486) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION OF PROPER VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 210074254) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUDIAB, MEHDI M $28,083.78 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $452.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,335.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
